zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：温和震荡偏多延续
zh.content:
当前AVAX呈温和震荡上行，价格6.6066略站上SMA20(6.51)，短线结构偏多但动能有限，关注延续性，多头略占优  

MACD指标维持轻微正值0.051，动能柱扩张有限，RSI缺失使超买判断不充分，市场偏中性整理，短线仍观望为主，需等待放量确认  

下方支撑集中在6.59与6.51区间，上方阻力6.63及6.70形成短线压制，波动收窄，关注突破方向  

策略上建议区间交易为主，突破6.64上方可视为短多信号，跌破6.51则转弱，注意风控

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD continues to trade in a mildly constructive short-term structure, holding above its 20-period simple moving average at 6.51237. Price action around 6.60 suggests consolidation after a modest 24-hour gain of 0.37%. The market appears to be stabilizing rather than trending strongly, with buyers defending dips near the mid-6.50 region. Overall momentum is neutral-to-slightly bullish, reflecting gradual recovery rather than impulsive upside movement.

Indicator signals are mixed but leaning cautiously positive. The price is trading above the SMA(20) at 6.51237, which supports a short-term bullish bias. However, lack of RSI data limits momentum confirmation. MACD reading at 0.0516 indicates mild bullish divergence, suggesting early-stage upward momentum. Without a visible signal line, confirmation is incomplete, so trend strength remains moderate rather than decisive. Overall

Immediate support is located around 6.512, aligning with the 20-SMA, followed by stronger support near 6.48 where recent consolidation occurred. On the upside, resistance is forming near 6.63 to 6.64, which corresponds to the session high range. A breakout above this zone could open the path toward 6.70, while failure to hold 6.51 may expose a retest of 6.45 support. Price structure suggests a tightening range.

Short-term traders may consider range-bound strategies while price remains between 6.51 support and 6.63 resistance. Buying dips near the SMA with tight risk control below 6.48 could offer favorable risk-reward conditions, while breakout traders may wait for a confirmed close above 6.64 before targeting higher levels. Until clearer momentum emerges, position sizing should remain conservative, as volatility is currently compressed and directional conviction is limited.
